The updated design features a shorter handle and widerŌüŻ face for an expanded sweet spot, giving youŌĆŗ more accuracy and control overŌĆŹ your shots.ŌĆŗ The 14mm core width is ideal for players who value both power and touch, making ŌĆŗit a versatile choice for any ŌĆŗplaying ŌüŻstyle.
